'''totangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacationy|vacationy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacationy|vacationy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| totangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:totangithi|totangithi]] || [[word:totangiji|totangiji]] || [[word:totangishi|totangishi]] || [[word:totangiki|totangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:totanguthuthu|totanguthuthu]] || [[word:totangujuju|totangujuju]] || [[word:totangushushu|totangushushu]] || [[word:totangukuku|totangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:totanguthu|totanguthu]] || [[word:totanguju|totanguju]] || [[word:totangushu|totangushu]] || [[word:totanguku|totanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:totangufthuf|totangufthuf]] || [[word:totangufjuf|totangufjuf]] || [[word:totangufshuf|totangufshuf]] || [[word:totangufkuf|totangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:totangethe|totangethe]] || [[word:totangeje|totangeje]] || [[word:totangeshe|totangeshe]] || [[word:totangeke|totangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:totangothotho|totangothotho]] || [[word:totangojojo|totangojojo]] || [[word:totangoshosho|totangoshosho]] || [[word:totangokoko|totangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:totangotho|totangotho]] || [[word:totangojo|totangojo]] || [[word:totangosho|totangosho]] || [[word:totangoko|totangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:totangofthof|totangofthof]] || [[word:totangofjof|totangofjof]] || [[word:totangofshof|totangofshof]] || [[word:totangofkof|totangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:totangĂŻfthĂŻf|totangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfjĂŻf|totangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfshĂŻf|totangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfkĂŻf|totangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:totangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|totangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|totangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|totangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|totangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:totangĂŻfthĂŻf|totangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfjĂŻf|totangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfshĂŻf|totangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfkĂŻf|totangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:totangĂŻfthĂŻf|totangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfjĂŻf|totangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfshĂŻf|totangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:totangĂŻfkĂŻf|totangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:totangĂŠthĂŠ|totangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:totangĂŠjĂŠ|totangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:totangĂŠshĂŠ|totangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:totangĂŠkĂŠ|totangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:totangathatha|totangathatha]] || [[word:totangajaja|totangajaja]] || [[word:totangashasha|totangashasha]] || [[word:totangakaka|totangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:totangatha|totangatha]] || [[word:totangaja|totangaja]] || [[word:totangasha|totangasha]] || [[word:totangaka|totangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:totangafthaf|totangafthaf]] || [[word:totangafjaf|totangafjaf]] || [[word:totangafshaf|totangafshaf]] || [[word:totangafkaf|totangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:totangasha|totangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:totangshĂ«asha|totangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:totangroasha|totangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:totangmuasha|totangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:totangyaasha|totangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gototangnkshĂ«asha|gototangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gototangnkroasha|gototangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gototangnkmuasha|gototangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gototangnkyaasha|gototangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:totatangasha|totatangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:totatangshĂ«asha|totatangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:totatangroasha|totatangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:totatangmuasha|totatangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:totatangyaasha|totatangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gototatangnkshĂ«asha|gototatangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gototatangnkroasha|gototatangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gototatangnkmuasha|gototatangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gototatangnkyaasha|gototatangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tetĂŠngasha|tetĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tetĂŠngshĂ«asha|tetĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tetĂŠngroasha|tetĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tetĂŠngmuasha|tetĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tetĂŠngyaasha|tetĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotetĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gotetĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotetĂŠngnkroasha|gotetĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotetĂŠngnkmuasha|gotetĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotetĂŠngnkyaasha|gotetĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:totfangasha|totfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:totfangshĂ«asha|totfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:totfangroasha|totfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:totfangmuasha|totfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:totfangyaasha|totfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gototfangnkshĂ«asha|gototfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gototfangnkroasha|gototfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gototfangnkmuasha|gototfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gototfangnkyaasha|gototfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
